label: AppleScript • scripted chained read-then-record
query: Read the current output volume and save it into the note 'Volume Log'.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for a chained workflow that spans two domains: step 1 READS system state (volume), step 2 WRITES it into a Notes body. The mock 'app world' answers the volume read and records the note write, so both the read classification and the persisted state are proven. No tokens.

scriptedCalls: {"script":"set body of note \"Volume Log\" to \"Volume is 42\""}
